_meta.author: ravikatiyar162
_meta.title: Presence Card
_meta.description:
Animated Presence Card
Description: A visually striking card component designed to showcase a primary message or product. It features a prominent image, clear typography, and an interactive 3D tilt effect on mouse hover, powered by framer-motion. The component is fully responsive and uses shadcn/ui theme variables for seamless light and dark mode integration.
